title: [codereview-pass1] coap_server.c response buffers do not validate against DTN/COAP capacity configs
description: In coap_server.c lichen_coap_respond and build_response use fixed COAP_RESPONSE_BUF_SIZE = CONFIG_COAP_SERVER_MESSAGE_SIZE but no runtime or compile-time validation that payload fits within DTN max or LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_MAX_PAYLOAD. Add BUILD_ASSERT(CONFIG_COAP_SERVER_MESSAGE_SIZE >= LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_MAX_PAYLOAD + COAP_OVERHEAD); and strict size checks before appending. Strict error paths required.
close_reason: Fixed in pass3: capacity BUILD_ASSERTs, strict checks, comment stripping per task
